channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: For its 40th birthday, IKEA has created a collection of its most iconic products — and I bet you have at least one of them somewhere in your home
item.description: Take a tour of the IKEA inventions that have stood the test of time — from Billy to Kallux.

item.title: Trump fires the entire National Science Board
item.description: Multiple sources are reporting that the Trump administration has dismissed the entire National Science Board (NSB). The NSB advises the president and Congress on the National Science Foundation (NSF), which has already been funding research at historically low levels and has seen significant delays in doling out that funding. The NSF has been fundamental in […]...

item.title: I'm still playing Forza Horizon 3 a decade after release — here's why I can't get enough of its beautiful world
item.description: For our From the Backlog series, I'm revisiting the brilliant open world of Forza Horizon 3.
